acquisition method: the instrument was operated in targeted mode (tMS2 mode)
alkylation reagent: alkylated for 20 min in the dark in 60-mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 20 min in the dark in 60-mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 1 μg of Trypsin/Lys-C Mix (Mass Spec Grade, Promega, Madison, WI) was added
enrichment method: incubated with appropriate amounts of polyclonal anti-TTR antibodies
fractionation method: after the separation of cell lysate proteins by sodium dodecyl sulfate polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis (SDS-PAGE)
instrument: MS analysis was performed by LC-MS/MS on a Q-Exactive MS instrument
ionization type: equipped with a Digital PicoView 550 nanospray source
labeling: the SUMOylation of the fusion protein composed of TTR and C93A mutant of Ubc9 resembled the SUMOylation of the non-fused C93A Ubc9 mutant
